# cap-radio



<!-- Auto Generated Below -->


## Properties

| Property   | Attribute  | Description                                             | Type      | Default     |
| ---------- | ---------- | ------------------------------------------------------- | --------- | ----------- |
| `checked`  | `checked`  | Whether this radio is selected                          | `boolean` | `false`     |
| `disabled` | `disabled` | Disables the radio                                      | `boolean` | `false`     |
| `error`    | `error`    | Error message                                           | `string`  | `undefined` |
| `hint`     | `hint`     | Hint text                                               | `string`  | `undefined` |
| `label`    | `label`    | Label text                                              | `string`  | `undefined` |
| `name`     | `name`     | Name attribute — shared across radios in the same group | `string`  | `undefined` |
| `required` | `required` | Marks the radio as required                             | `boolean` | `false`     |
| `value`    | `value`    | Value submitted with the form                           | `string`  | `undefined` |


## Events

| Event       | Description                         | Type                  |
| ----------- | ----------------------------------- | --------------------- |
| `capChange` | Emitted when this radio is selected | `CustomEvent<string>` |
